'''Gumbrak Hoxz''' was a young [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was a student at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]<ref name="CSWE" /> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]<ref name="itpm">''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Episode I]]''</ref> during the last [[Local year|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="CSWE" /> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he was a contemporary of [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]]. He participated in the [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]], in which, he was set against fellow apprentice [[Atresh Pikil]] in the first round. Apprentice Enwandung-Esterhazy, who was watching from the side-lines, thought that, although he had grown in strength leading up to the tournament, he had yet to adjust to his new size and webbed feet.

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
